13-year-old me was into rock, not R&B. The exception was this album: “It’s About Time” by SWV. I listened to this CD over and over. With all of the ‘90s albums being reissued on vinyl, it’s a crime that this very successful album isn’t available for my turntable. 
#swv #vinyl

data.body: Was looking out the window daydreaming & saw a guy walking towards me down the street.
